meta.notes: T1/T2/T3 executed in a single continuous bash call — WALL_START and WALL_END captured in the same shell, no CC activity between runs. LLM JSON truncation triggered on all 3 runs (auto-repaired). Token delta extracted from session JSONL with 60s pre-window buffer; covers 3 CC messages (pre-run decision, post-run result read, parse).

task.name: social-account-analyzer
task.purpose: Analyze 3 public social media accounts across Instagram, X/Twitter, and TikTok — fetch profile + posts, compute engagement metrics, run two-pass LLM analysis, return growth recommendations
task.expected_output: JSON with profile summary, performance metrics, content analysis, top posts, growth opportunities, recommendations, and 2-week content calendar per account

install.notes: No install step — skill pre-installed at ~/Pikabot/nova3-agent-skills/social-account-analyzer/.

asset_acquisition.notes: No asset download — pure API + LLM skill.

steps.name: t1_instagram_fetch
steps.notes: @natgeo Instagram public. Apify instagram-profile-scraper + instagram-post-scraper in parallel.

steps.name: t1_instagram_llm
steps.notes: pass1 (2800 max_tokens) + pass2 (2000 max_tokens) via Anthropic proxy. LLM JSON truncated → auto-repaired. Result: 274.96M followers, 0.03% ER, Carousel best type, stable trend.

steps.name: t2_x_llm
steps.notes: pass1 + pass2 via Anthropic proxy. LLM JSON truncated → auto-repaired. Proxy latency spike observed. Result: 90.94M followers, 0.03% ER, Video best type, growing trend.

steps.name: t3_tiktok_llm
steps.notes: pass1 + pass2 via Anthropic proxy. LLM JSON truncated → auto-repaired. Result: 160.6M followers, 0.9% ER, Video best type, declining trend.

execution.notes: execution.total_s = t1 + t2 + t3 (126.707 + 164.665 + 88.480). All 3 runs triggered LLM JSON truncation + auto-repair. T2 llm slow (158.7s) — Anthropic proxy latency spike.

delivery.notes: No CDN upload — local delivery only. 3 JSON reports: natgeo 13KB, NASA 12KB, khaby.lame 12KB.

tokens._note: Nulled: extract-cc-tokens.py reported session-cumulative totals, not per-task usage. Token data included other tasks from the same Claude Code session.

cost._note: Nulled: derived from unreliable session-cumulative token counts.
